name: A Cat of Ill Omen
description: FLIP: You can add 1 Trap Card that lists "A Cat of Ill Omen" in its card text from your Deck to the top of your Deck.

name: A Man with Wdjat
description: If this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent, select and activate 1 of these effects: ● Look at 1 face-down Spell or Trap Card your opponent controls. ● Look at 1 card in your opponent's hand.

name: Achacha Archer
description: When this card is Normal Summoned, inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: Alligator's Sword
description: A strange, sword-wielding monster that can cut down opponents with its sharp blade.

name: Alligator's Sword Dragon
description: This monster cannot be destroyed by battle with a monster that has 1900 or more ATK.

name: Amazoness Chain Master
description: When this card is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard by your opponent's card effect, you can pay 1500 Life Points to take control of 1 monster in your opponent's hand.

name: Amazoness Swords Woman
description: Your opponent takes any Battle Damage you would have taken from battles involving this attacking card.

name: Amulet Dragon
description: Must be Fusion Summoned. Once per turn: You can banish any number of Spell Cards from your Graveyard; this card gains 300 ATK for each banished Spell Card.

name: Apprentice Magician
description: When this card is Normal Summoned, place 1 Spell Counter on 1 face-up card that can have a Spell Counter. When this card is destroyed by battle, you can Special Summon 1 Level 2 or lower Spellcaster-Type monster from your Deck in face-down Defense Position.

name: Arcane Barrier
description: Each time a Spellcaster-Type monster(s) on the field is destroyed, place 1 Spell Counter on this card. You can send this card to the Graveyard to draw 1 card for every 2 Spell Counters on it.

name: Armed Ninja
description: FLIP: Target 1 face-up Spell Card on the field; destroy that target.

name: Axe Dragonute
description: While this card is attacking, change it to Defense Position at the end of the Damage Step. This card's effect is negated while in Defense Position.

name: Baby Dragon
description: A young dragon searching for a brighter future.

name: Back to the Front
description: Target 1 monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only activate 1 "Back to the Front" per turn.

name: Backfire
description: Each time a FIRE monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: Bait Doll
description: Force the activation of 1 Set Trap Card to see if it can be activated. If the activation timing is incorrect, destroy it. If it is correct, negate the effect and destroy it.

name: Banner of Courage
description: All monsters you control gain 200 ATK during your Battle Phase only.

name: Begone, Knave!
description: When a monster inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Return that monster to the hand.

name: Big Shield Gardna
description: During your opponent's turn, if this card is attacked while in face-down Defense Position: Change this card to face-up Defense Position. Its DEF becomes 1000 during the Damage Step only.

name: Black Brachios
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can change 1 face-up monster your opponent controls to face-down Defense Position.

name: Black Dragon Collapserpent
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 LIGHT monster from your Graveyard. You can only Special Summon "Black Dragon Collapserpent" once per turn this way. If this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: You can add 1 "White Dragon Wyverburster" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Black Luster Ritual
description: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Black Luster Soldier". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more.

name: Black Luster Soldier
description: A soldier who underwent a special ritual. This warrior is the master of both light and darkness.

name: Black Pendant
description: The equipped monster gains 500 ATK. When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: Black Stego
description: If this Defense Position card is attacked, change it to Attack Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Black Veloci
description: When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by a direct attack: Inflict 400 damage to your opponent.

name: Blade Knight
description: While you have 1 or less cards in your hand, this card gains 400 ATK. If you have no other monsters on your field, negate the effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by this card in battle.

name: Blast Magician
description: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card. You can remove Spell Counters from this card to destroy 1 monster on the field with ATK less than or equal to the number of Spell Counters removed × 700.

name: Block Attack
description: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change it to Defense Position. It cannot change its battle position until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon
description: Blue-Eyes White Dragon + Blue-Eyes White Dragon + Blue-Eyes White Dragon

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
description: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Book of Lunar Eclipse
description: Change all face-up monsters on the field to face-down Defense Position. During the End Phase of this turn, change as many face-down monsters on the field as possible to face-up Defense Position.

name: Book of Secret Arts
description: A Spellcaster-Type monster equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 300 points.

name: Bowganian
description: During your Standby Phase, inflict 600 points of damage to your opponent's Life Points.

name: Breaker the Magical Warrior
description: When this card is Normal Summoned, place 1 Spell Counter on it (max. 1). This card gains 300 ATK while it has a Spell Counter. You can remove 1 Spell Counter from this card to destroy 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field.

name: Bright Star Dragon
description: A dragon that shines brightly and battles with overwhelming power.

name: Burst Rebirth
description: Pay 2000 Life Points, then target 1 monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position.

name: Buster Blader
description: Gains 500 ATK for every Dragon-Type monster on your opponent's field and Graveyard.

name: Butterspy Protection
description: Target 1 face-up monster you control; it gains 300 ATK and DEF, also it cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

name: Byser Shock
description: When this card is flipped face-up, return all face-down Defense Position monsters on the field to the hand.

name: Call of the Haunted
description: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that monster in Attack Position. When this card leaves the field, destroy that monster. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Chaos Command Magician
description: Negate any monster effect that targets this 1 face-up card.

name: Coffin Seller
description: Each time a monster(s) is sent to your opponent's Graveyard: Inflict 300 damage to your opponent.

name: Command Knight
description: All Warrior monsters you control gain 400 ATK. If you control another monster, monsters your opponent controls cannot target this card for attacks.

name: Compulsory Evacuation Device
description: Target 1 monster on the field; return that target to the hand.

name: Comrade Swordsman of Landstar
description: All Warrior monsters you control gain 400 ATK.

name: Copy Knight
description: When a Level 4 or lower Warrior monster is Normal Summoned to your field: Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster with the same name and Level as the Normal Summoned monster (Warrior/LIGHT/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is also still a Trap.)

name: Covering Fire
description: During the Damage Step, if an opponent's monster attacks your monster: Target 1 other face-up monster you control; your attacked monster gains ATK equal to that target's ATK, during that Damage Step only.

name: Crimson Ninja
description: FLIP: Target 1 Trap Card on the field; destroy that target. (If the target is Set, reveal it, and destroy it if it is a Trap Card. Otherwise, return it to its original position.)

name: Crystal Seer
description: FLIP: Excavate the top 2 cards of your Deck, then add 1 of them to your hand, then place the other on the bottom of your Deck.

name: Curse of the Masked Beast
description: This card is used to Ritual Summon "The Masked Beast". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 8 or more.

name: DMZ Dragon
description: Once per turn: You can target 1 Dragon monster you control and 1 Dragon Tuner in your GY; equip that Tuner from your GY to that monster on the field as an Equip Card. If a monster equipped with an Equip Card by this effect attacks, you can send that Equip Card to the GY; that monster can attack once again in a row.

name: Damage Mage
description: When you take damage from a card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, gain Life Points equal to the damage you took.

name: Dark Blade
description: An expert swordsman who commands dragons. His dragon-slaying sword is a force to be reckoned with.

name: Dark Driceratops
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

name: Dark Elf
description: This card requires a cost of 1000 of your own Life Points to attack.

name: Dark Eruption
description: Target 1 DARK monster with 1500 or less ATK in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Dark Factory of Mass Production
description: Target 2 Normal Monsters in your Graveyard; add those targets to your hand.

name: Dark Horizon
description: When you take battle or effect damage: Special Summon 1 DARK Spellcaster-Type monster from your Deck with ATK less than or equal to the damage you took.

name: Dark Jeroid
description: When this card is Summoned: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; it loses 800 ATK.

name: Dark Magician
description: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

name: Dark Magician Girl
description: Gains 300 ATK for every "Dark Magician" or "Magician of Black Chaos" in the GYs.

name: Dark Magician the Dragon Knight
description:
"Dark Magician" + 1 Dragon monster
This card's name becomes "Dark Magician" while on the field or in the GY. Your opponent cannot target Spells/Traps you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

name: Dark Mimic LV1
description: FLIP: Draw 1 card. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can send this card to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dark Mimic LV3" from your hand or Deck.

name: Dark Mimic LV3
description: If this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Draw 1 card, but if this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Dark Mimic LV1", draw 2 cards instead.

name: Dark Spell Regeneration
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target 1 Spell in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 "Monster Reborn" from your hand or Set on your field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "The Winged Dragon of Ra" from your GY ignoring its Summoning conditions, then you can send 1 monster your opponent controls to the GY, also send that Special Summoned monster to the GY during the End Phase.

name: Dash Warrior
description: If this card attacks, it gains 1200 ATK during the Damage Step only.

name: De-Spell
description: Target 1 face-up Spell, or 1 Set Spell/Trap, on the field; destroy that target if it is a Spell. (If the target is Set, reveal it.)

name: Decoy Dragon
description: If this card is targeted for an attack: Target 1 Level 7 or higher Dragon monster in your GY; Special Summon it, and if you do, change the attack target to it and perform damage calculation.

name: Defender, the Magical Knight
description: When this card is Normal Summoned, place 1 Spell Counter on it (max. 1). Once per turn, if a face-up Spellcaster-Type monster(s) on the field would be destroyed, you can remove 1 Spell Counter from a card you control for each of those monsters instead.

name: Defense Draw
description: During your opponent's turn, at damage calculation: Make the battle damage you take from this battle 0, and if you do, draw 1 card.

name: Destroyersaurus
description: You can discard this card to the Graveyard; add 1 "Jurassic World" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Destruct Potion
description: Target 1 monster you control; destroy that target, and if you do, gain Life Points equal to its ATK.

name: Diabound Kernel
description: When this card declares an attack: It gains 600 ATK. (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses ATK equal to this card's current ATK until the end of this turn, then banish this card until the Standby Phase of the next turn.

name: Different Dimension Dragon
description: This card cannot be destroyed by the effect of a Spell or Trap Card that does not target it. This card is not destroyed by battle with a monster with 1900 or less ATK.

name: Dimension Wall
description: Activate only when an opponent's monster declares an attack. Instead of you, your opponent takes the battle damage you would have taken from this battle.

name: Dodger Dragon
description: This card's Normal Summon cannot be negated. When this card is Normal Summoned, Counter Trap Cards cannot be activated.

name: Double Spell
description: Discard 1 Spell Card, then target 1 Spell Card in your opponent's Graveyard; use it as your own Spell Card.

name: Dragon Treasure
description: A Dragon-Type monster equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 300 points.

name: Dragon's Mirror
description: Banish from your field or GY the Fusion Materials listed on a Dragon Fusion Monster, then Special Summon that Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.)

name: Dragon's Rebirth
description: Target 1 Dragon monster you control; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon 1 Dragon monster from your hand or GY.

name: Dragonic Warrior
description: You can discard 1 card; Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower Dragon monster from your hand or Deck, except "Dragonic Warrior", but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Dragonic Warrior" once per turn.

name: Drillago
description: If the only cards your opponent controls are face-up monsters with 1600 or more ATK, this card can attack your opponent directly.

name: Dust Tornado
description: Target 1 Spell/Trap Card your opponent controls; destroy that target, then you can Set 1 Spell/Trap Card from your hand.

name: E - Emergency Call
description: Add 1 "Elemental HERO" monster from your Deck to your hand.

name: Electromagnetic Turtle
description: During your opponent's Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; end the Battle Phase. You can only use this effect of "Electromagnetic Turtle" once per Duel.

name: Element Dragon
description:
This card gains the following effect(s) as long as there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field:
● FIRE: This card gains 500 ATK.
● WIND: If this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle, it can attack once again in a row.

name: Element Saurus
description:
This card gains the following effect(s) as long as there is a monster(s) with the following Attribute(s) on the field:
● FIRE: This card gains 500 ATK.
● EARTH: Negate the effects of Effect Monsters destroyed by battle with this card.

name: Elemental HERO Avian
description: A winged Elemental HERO who wheels through the sky and manipulates the wind. His signature move, Feather Wind, cuts down villainy from on high.

name: Elemental HERO Bladedge
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

name: Elemental HERO Blazeman
description: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck to your hand. During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Fusion Monsters, also send 1 "Elemental HERO" monster from your Deck to the GY, except "Elemental HERO Blazeman", and if you do, this card's Attribute, ATK, and DEF each become the same as the monster sent to the GY, until the end of this turn. You can only use 1 "Elemental HERO Blazeman" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

name: Elemental HERO Bubbleman
description: If this is the only card in your hand, you can Special Summon it (from your hand). When this card is Summoned: You can draw 2 cards, if you control no other cards and have no cards in your hand.

name: Elemental HERO Burstinatrix
description: A flame manipulator who is the only woman among the Elemental HEROes. Her Burstfire burns away villainy.

name: Elemental HERO Captain Gold
description: You can discard this card to the Graveyard; add 1 "Skyscraper" from your Deck to your hand. If "Skyscraper" is not on the field, destroy this card.

name: Elemental HERO Clayman
description: An Elemental HERO with a clay body built to last. He will preserve peace at any cost.

name: Elemental HERO Darkbright
description:
"Elemental HERO Sparkman" + "Elemental HERO Necroshade"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase. If this card is destroyed: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy that target.

name: Elemental HERO Electrum
description:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned and cannot be Special Summoned by other ways. While face-up on the field, this card's Attribute is also treated as WIND, WATER, FIRE, and EARTH. When this card is Fusion Summoned: Shuffle all banished cards into the Deck(s).

name: Elemental HERO Escuridao
description:
1 "Elemental HERO" monster + 1 DARK monster
Must be Fusion Summoned. Gains 100 ATK for each "Elemental HERO" monster in your GY.

name: Elemental HERO Flame Wingman
description:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK of the destroyed monster in the GY.

name: Elemental HERO Heat
description: Gains 200 ATK for each face-up "Elemental HERO" monster you control.

name: Elemental HERO Ice Edge
description: Once per turn, during your Main Phase 1: You can discard 1 card; this card can attack directly this turn. When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent by a direct attack: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; destroy that target.

name: Elemental HERO Inferno
description:
"Elemental HERO Heat" + "Elemental HERO Lady Heat"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card battles a WATER monster, this card gains 1000 ATK during damage calculation only.

name: Elemental HERO Lady Heat
description: During your End Phase: Inflict 200 damage to your opponent for each face-up "Elemental HERO" monster you control.

name: Elemental HERO Mariner
description:
"Elemental HERO Bubbleman" + "Elemental HERO Avian"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If you have any Set cards in your Spell & Trap Zone, this card can attack directly.

name: Elemental HERO Mudballman
description:
"Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned.

name: Elemental HERO Necroid Shaman
description:
"Elemental HERO Wildheart" + "Elemental HERO Necroshade"
Must be Fusion Summoned. When this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; destroy that target, then Special Summon 1 monster from your opponent's GY to their side of the field.

name: Elemental HERO Necroshade
description: Once, while this card is in the GY, you can Normal Summon 1 Level 5 or higher "Elemental HERO" monster from your hand without Tributing.

name: Elemental HERO Neos
description: A new Elemental HERO has arrived from Neo-Space! When he initiates a Contact Fusion with a Neo-Spacian, his unknown powers are unleashed.

name: Elemental HERO Neos Alius
description:
This card is treated as a Normal Monster while face-up on the field or in the GY. While this card is a Normal Monster on the field, you can Normal Summon it to have it become an Effect Monster with this effect:
● This card's name becomes "Elemental HERO Neos" while it is face-up on the field.

name: Elemental HERO Ocean
description: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can target 1 "HERO" monster you control or in your GY; return that target to the hand.

name: Elemental HERO Prisma
description: Once per turn: You can reveal 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, then send 1 of the Fusion Materials listed on that card from your Main Deck to the GY; this card's name becomes the sent monster's name until the End Phase.

name: Elemental HERO Rampart Blaster
description:
"Elemental HERO Clayman" + "Elemental HERO Burstinatrix"
Must be Fusion Summoned. This card can attack directly while in Defense Position. If it does, apply its ATK for damage calculation, and its ATK is halved during damage calculation only.

name: Elemental HERO Sparkman
description: An Elemental HERO and a warrior of light who proficiently wields many kinds of armaments. His Static Shockwave cuts off the path of villainy.

name: Elemental HERO Steam Healer
description:
"Elemental HERO Burstinatrix" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. If this card destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: Gain LP equal to the original ATK of that destroyed monster in the GY.

name: Elemental HERO Tempest
description:
"Elemental HERO Avian" + "Elemental HERO Sparkman" + "Elemental HERO Bubbleman"
Must be Fusion Summoned. You can send 1 other card you control to the GY, then target 1 monster you control; while this card is face-up on the field, that monster cannot be destroyed by battle.

name: Elemental HERO Voltic
description: When this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can target 1 of your banished "Elemental HERO" monsters; Special Summon that target.

name: Elemental HERO Wildheart
description: Unaffected by Trap effects.

name: Elemental HERO Woodsman
description: Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: You can add 1 "Polymerization" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

name: Elemental Recharge
description: Gain 1000 LP for each face-up "Elemental HERO" monster you control.

name: Emblem of Dragon Destroyer
description: Add 1 "Buster Blader" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

name: Enemy Controller
Enraged Battle Ox
description: If a Beast, Beast-Warrior, or Winged Beast-Type monster you control attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent.

name: Eria the Water Charmer
description: FLIP: Target 1 WATER monster your opponent controls; take control of that monster while this card is face-up on the field.

name: Evilswarm Salamandra
description: Up to twice per turn: You can banish 1 monster from your GY; this card gains 300 ATK until the end of your opponent's turn.

name: Felgrand Dragon
description: Cannot be Special Summoned except from the Graveyard, and only if it was sent there from the field. If this card is Special Summoned: Target 1 monster in your Graveyard; this card gains ATK equal to that monster's Level x 200.

name: Final Attack Orders
description: All face-up monsters on the field are changed to Attack Position, and their battle positions cannot be changed.

name: Flamvell Guard
description: A Flamvell guardian who commands fire with his will. His magma-hot barrier protects his troops from intruders.

name: Fortress Warrior
description: You take no battle damage from attacks involving this card. Once per turn, this card cannot be destroyed by battle.

name: Full-Force Strike
description: Target 1 face-up monster you control; this turn, it cannot be destroyed by battle, players take no battle damage from its attacks, and if it attacks an opponent's monster, destroy that opponent's monster after damage calculation.

name: Fusion Recovery
description: Target 1 "Polymerization", and 1 Fusion Material Monster that was used for a Fusion Summon, in your Graveyard; add them to your hand.

name: Gaia The Fierce Knight
description: A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.

name: Gearfried the Iron Knight
description: If either player equips an Equip Card to this card: Destroy that Equip Card.

name: General Raiho of the Ice Barrier
description: When an effect resolves that was activated by an Effect Monster that was on your opponent's side of the field, they must discard 1 card or the effect is negated (their choice).

name: Giant Germ
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent, then you can Special Summon any number of "Giant Germs" from your Deck in face-up Attack Position.

name: Giant Rat
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck in Attack Position.

name: Giant Rex
description: Cannot attack directly. If this card is banished: You can Special Summon this card, and if you do, this card gains 200 ATK for each of your banished Dinosaur monsters. You can only use this effect of "Giant Rex" once per turn.

name: Gil Garth
description: This giant steel-clad soldier is a terror to behold. He wields his massive blade with brutal efficiency.

name: Gilasaurus
description: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand). If Summoned this way: Activate this effect; your opponent can Special Summon 1 monster from their GY.

name: Gilford the Legend
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can equip as many Equip Spell Cards from your Graveyard as possible to Warrior-Type monster(s) on your side of the field.

name: Goblin Attack Force
description: If this card attacks, it is changed to Defense Position at the end of the Battle Phase, and its battle position cannot be changed until the End Phase of your next turn.

name: Gold Sarcophagus
description: Banish 1 card from your Deck, face-up. During your second Standby Phase after this card's activation, add that card to your hand.

name: Golem Dragon
description: Your opponent cannot target face-up Dragon-Type monsters for attacks, except this one.

name: Graveyard of Wandering Souls
description: If this card is already face-up on the field: If a monster(s) is sent from your hand or field to your GY: Special Summon 1 "Fireball Token" (Pyro/FIRE/Level 1/ATK 100/DEF 100). You can only use this effect of "Graveyard of Wandering Souls" once per turn.

name: Gravity Axe - Grarl
description: The equipped monster gains 500 ATK. Monsters your opponent controls cannot change their battle positions.

name: Hero Counterattack
description: When an "Elemental HERO" monster you control is destroyed by battle: Your opponent chooses and reveals 1 random card from your hand, then, if it is an "Elemental HERO" monster, you destroy 1 monster your opponent controls and Special Summon the chosen monster.

name: Hero Ring
description: Target 1 Warrior monster on the field with 1500 or less ATK; equip this card to that target. Monsters your opponent controls with 1900 or more ATK cannot attack the equipped monster.

name: Hero Signal
description: When a monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "Elemental HERO" monster from your hand or Deck.

name: Holding Arms
description: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; while this card is face-up on the field, that face-up monster cannot attack, also its effects are negated. While that face-up monster is on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.

name: Holding Legs
description: If this card is Summoned: Return all Set Spell and Trap Cards on the field to the hand. You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 Set Spell/Trap Card your opponent controls; that Set card cannot be activated until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: Humanoid Slime
description: This slime apparently has some human genes in its genetic makeup.

name: Hyper Hammerhead
description: At the end of the Damage Step, if an opponent's monster that battled this card is not destroyed: Return that opponent's monster to the hand.

name: Interdimensional Matter Transporter
description: Target 1 face-up monster you control; banish that target until the End Phase.

name: Jam Breeding Machine
description: During each of your Standby Phases: Special Summon 1 "Slime Token" (Aqua-Type/WATER/LEVEL 1/ATK 500/DEF 500) in Attack Position. You cannot Summon any monsters, except "Slime Tokens" (but you can Set).

name: Junk Barrage
description: When the equipped monster destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, inflict damage to your opponent equal to half the destroyed monster's ATK in the Graveyard.

name: Jurassic World
description: All Dinosaur-Type monsters gain 300 ATK and DEF.

name: Kaiser Sea Horse
description: This card can be treated as 2 Tributes for the Tribute Summon of a LIGHT monster.

name: Kunai with Chain
description:
Activate 1 or both of these effects (simultaneously).
● When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; change that target to Defense Position.
● Target 1 face-up monster you control; equip this card to that target. It gains 500 ATK.

name: Lava Golem
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must first be Special Summoned (from your hand) to your opponent's side of the field by Tributing 2 monsters they control. You cannot Normal Summon/Set the turn you Special Summon this card. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.

name: Legendary Fiend
description: During each of your Standby Phases: This card gains 700 ATK.

name: Lightning Blade
description: Equip only to a Warrior monster. It gains 800 ATK. All WATER monsters on the field lose 500 ATK.

name: Little-Winguard
description: Once per turn, during your End Phase: You can change the battle position of this card.

name: Luster Dragon
description: A very beautiful dragon covered with sapphire. It does not like fights, but has incredibly high attack power.

name: Magic Cylinder
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, and if you do, inflict damage to your opponent equal to its ATK.

name: Magic Formula
description: Equip only to "Dark Magician" or "Dark Magician Girl". It gains 700 ATK. When this card is sent from the field to the GY: Gain 1000 LP.

name: Magic Jammer
description: When a Spell Card is activated: Discard 1 card; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Magic Planter
description: Send 1 face-up Continuous Trap you control to the GY; draw 2 cards.

name: Magical Dimension
description: If you control a Spellcaster monster: Target 1 monster you control; Tribute that target, then Special Summon 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand, then you can destroy 1 monster on the field.

name: Magical Stone Excavation
description: Discard 2 cards, then target 1 Spell in your GY; add it to your hand.

name: Magical Undertaker
description: FLIP: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower Spellcaster monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

name: Magician of Faith
description: FLIP: Target 1 Spell in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Magician's Circle
description: When a Spellcaster monster declares an attack: Each player Special Summons 1 Spellcaster monster with 2000 or less ATK from their Deck in Attack Position.

name: Magician's Valkyria
description: Monsters your opponent controls cannot target face-up Spellcaster monsters for attacks, except this one.

name: Marauding Captain
description: Your opponent cannot target other Warrior monsters you control for attacks. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower monster from your hand.

name: Mask of Darkness
description: FLIP: Target 1 Trap in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: Mask of Dispel
description: Activate this card by targeting 1 face-up Spell Card on the field. During each of your Standby Phases: Inflict 500 damage to the controller of the target. When that target is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Mask of Weakness
description: Target 1 attacking monster; that target loses 700 ATK until the end of this turn.

name: Masked Dragon
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Dragon monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck in Attack Position.

name: Megalosmasher X
description: With its exceptionally strong jaw and gold-armor-plated shell, this prehistoric predator is completely impervious to fossilization. Foraging near the seaside, it will happily crunch on any metallic scrap it can find—especially the wreckage of unfortunate submarines.

name: Miracle Fusion
description: Banish from your field or GY the Fusion Materials listed on an "Elemental HERO" Fusion Monster, then Special Summon that Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.)

name: Mirage Dragon
description: Your opponent cannot activate Trap Cards during the Battle Phase.

name: Mountain
description: All Dragon, Winged Beast, and Thunder monsters gain 200 ATK/DEF.

name: Mystic Tomato
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 DARK monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck in Attack Position.

name: Mystical Elf
description: A delicate elf that lacks offensive power, but has a very strong defense backed by mystical power.

name: Negate Attack
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; negate the attack, then end the Battle Phase.

name: Nightmare Wheel
description: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster your opponent controls; it cannot attack or change its battle position. During each of your Standby Phases: Inflict 500 damage to your opponent. When that target leaves the field, destroy this card.

name: Nightmare's Steelcage
description: This card remains on the field for 2 of your opponent's turns. No monsters can attack.

name: Nobleman of Extermination
description: Target 1 face-down Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy that target, and if you do, banish it, then, if it was a Trap Card, each player looks at their Deck, and banishes all cards with that card's name from their Deck.

name: O - Oversoul
description: Target 1 "Elemental HERO" Normal Monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

name: Ominous Fortunetelling
description: Once per turn, during your opponent's Standby Phase: You can randomly choose 1 card in your opponent's hand and guess its type (Monster, Spell, or Trap). If you guess right, inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

name: One Day of Peace
description: Each player draws 1 card, and neither player takes damage until the end of your opponent's next turn.

name: Oxygeddon
description: If this card is destroyed by battle with a Pyro-Type monster, or if this card destroys a Pyro-Type monster by battle: Both players take 800 damage.

name: Paladin of White Dragon
description: You can Ritual Summon this card with "White Dragon Ritual". Must be Ritual Summoned. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card attacks a face-down Defense Position monster: Destroy that face-down monster. You can Tribute this card; Special Summon 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or Deck, but it cannot attack this turn.

name: Pitch-Black Power Stone
description: Activate this card by placing 3 Spell Counters on it. Once per turn, during your turn: You can target 1 other face-up card on the field that you can place a Spell Counter on; remove 1 Spell Counter from this card, and if you do, place 1 Spell Counter on that target. When the last Spell Counter(s) is removed from this card, destroy it.

name: Polymerization
description: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material.

name: Pot of Avarice
description: Target 5 monsters in your GY; shuffle all 5 into the Deck, then draw 2 cards.

name: Pot of Duality
description: Excavate the top 3 cards of your Deck, add 1 of them to your hand, also shuffle the rest back into your Deck. You can only activate 1 "Pot of Duality" per turn. You cannot Special Summon during the turn you activate this card.

name: Power Invader
description: If your opponent controls 2 or more monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing.

name: Raise Body Heat
description: A Dinosaur-Type monster equipped with this card increases its ATK and DEF by 300 points.

name: Reinforcement of the Army
description: Add 1 Level 4 or lower Warrior monster from your Deck to your hand.

name: Relieve Monster
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target 1 monster you control; return that target to the hand, then Special Summon 1 Level 4 monster from your hand.

name: Remove Trap
description: Target 1 face-up Trap Card on the field; destroy that target.

name: Return from the Different Dimension
description: Pay half your LP; Special Summon as many of your banished monsters as possible, but banish them during the End Phase of this turn.

name: Revival Jam
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can pay 1000 LP; Special Summon it in face-up Defense Position during your next turn's Standby Phase.

name: Roc from the Valley of Haze
description: When this card is sent directly from your hand to the Graveyard, add this card to the Deck and shuffle it.

name: Sabersaurus
description: This gentle dinosaur is a favorite of children. It loves to eat grass and peacefully live in the plains.

name: Sakuretsu Armor
description: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target the attacking monster; destroy that target.

name: Sangan
description: If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck to your hand, but you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with that name for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Sangan" once per turn.

name: Sauropod Brachion
description: Cannot be Special Summoned from the Deck. You can Tribute Summon this card by Tributing 1 Dinosaur-Type monster. Once per turn: You can change this card to face-down Defense Position. If this card is Tribute Summoned: Change all other face-up monsters on the field to face-down Defense Position.

name: Secret Blast
description: Inflict 300 damage to your opponent for each card they control. If this card you control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect and sent to your GY: Inflict 1000 damage to your opponent.

name: Seven Tools of the Bandit
description: When a Trap Card is activated: Pay 1000 LP; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Shield Warrior
description: During damage calculation, if your monster is battling (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY; your monster cannot be destroyed by this battle.

name: Skilled Blue Magician
description: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell Card resolves (max. 3). You can Tribute this card with 3 Spell Counters on it; Special Summon 1 "Gaia The Fierce Knight" monster from your hand, Deck, or Graveyard. You can banish this card from your Graveyard, then target 1 card you control that can have Spell Counters placed on it; place 1 Spell Counter on that card.

name: Skilled Dark Magician
description: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell Card resolves (max. 3). You can Tribute this card with 3 Spell Counters on it; Special Summon 1 "Dark Magician" from your hand, Deck, or GY.

name: Skyscraper
description: If a "HERO" monster attacks a monster with higher ATK, the attacking monster gains 1000 ATK during damage calculation only.

name: Skyscraper 2 - Hero City
description: Once per turn, during your Main Phase: You can target 1 "Elemental HERO" monster in your GY that was destroyed by battle and sent there; Special Summon that target.

name: Slate Warrior
description: FLIP: This card gains 500 ATK and DEF. If this card is destroyed by battle: The monster that destroyed it loses 500 ATK and DEF.

name: Sogen
description: All Warrior and Beast-Warrior monsters on the field gain 200 ATK/DEF.

name: Solemn Wishes
description: Each time you draw a card(s): Gain 500 LP.

name: Soul Union
description: Target 1 face-up "Elemental HERO" monster you control; until the End Phase, it gains 200 ATK for each "Elemental HERO" monster in your Graveyard.

name: Spear Dragon
description: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage to your opponent. If this card attacks, change it to Defense Position at the end of the Damage Step.

name: Spellbinding Circle
description: Activate this card by targeting 1 monster your opponent controls; it cannot attack or change its battle position. When that monster is destroyed, destroy this card.

name: Stamping Destruction
description: If you control a Dragon-Type monster: Target 1 Spell/Trap Card on the field; destroy that target, and if you do, inflict 500 damage to its controller.

name: Stop Defense
description: Target 1 Defense Position monster your opponent controls; change it to face-up Attack Position.

name: Stray Lambs
description: Special Summon 2 "Lamb Tokens" (Beast-Type/EARTH/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) in Defense Position. You cannot Summon other monsters the turn you activate this card (but you can Set).

name: Summoned Skull
description: A fiend with dark powers for confusing the enemy. Among the Fiend-Type monsters, this monster boasts considerable force.

name: Super Conductor Tyranno
description: Once per turn: You can Tribute 1 monster; inflict 1000 damage to your opponent. This card cannot declare an attack the turn this effect is activated.

name: Swallowtail Butterspy
description: When another monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; it loses ATK equal to the battle damage inflicted.

name: Sword Arm of Dragon
description: An ancient dinosaur with a huge, sword-like blade growing out of its tail.

name: Swords of Revealing Light
description: After this card's activation, it remains on the field, but destroy it during the End Phase of your opponent's 3rd turn. When this card is activated: If your opponent controls face-down monsters, flip all of them face-up. While this card is face-up on the field, your opponent's monsters cannot declare an attack.

name: Terraforming
description: Add 1 Field Spell from your Deck to your hand.

name: The A. Forces
description: All Warrior-Type monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each Warrior-Type and Beast-Warrior-Type monster you control.

name: The Gates of Dark World
description: All Fiend monsters gain 300 ATK/DEF. Once per turn: You can banish 1 Fiend monster from your GY; discard 1 Fiend monster, then draw 1 card.

name: The Masked Beast
description: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Curse of the Masked Beast".

name: The Tricky
description: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by discarding 1 card.

name: The Warrior Returning Alive
description: Target 1 Warrior monster in your GY; add that target to your hand.

name: The White Stone of Legend
description: If this card is sent to the GY: Add 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Threatening Roar
description: Your opponent cannot declare an attack this turn.

name: Thunder Dragon
description: You can discard this card; add up to 2 "Thunder Dragons" from your Deck to your hand.

name: Time Machine
description: When a monster is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: Special Summon that monster to the same field it was on, in the same battle position it was in when destroyed.

name: Trap Eater
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by sending 1 face-up Trap your opponent controls to the GY.

name: Trap Jammer
description: When your opponent activates a Trap Card during the Battle Phase: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

name: Trident Warrior
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 monster from your hand.

name: Twin-Headed Behemoth
description: If this card is destroyed and sent from the field to the GY: You can Special Summon this card during the End Phase, but its ATK/DEF become 1000, and you can only use this effect of "Twin-Headed Behemoth" once per Duel.

name: Twin-Headed Thunder Dragon
description: "Thunder Dragon" + "Thunder Dragon"

name: Twister
description: Pay 500 LP, then target 1 face-up Spell/Trap on the field; destroy that target.

name: Tyrant Wing
description: Target 1 Dragon monster on the field; equip this card to it. It gains 400 ATK/DEF, also it can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if the monster equipped with this card by this effect attacked an opponent's monster this turn: Destroy this card.

name: Vengeful Bog Spirit
description: Monsters cannot attack the turn they are Summoned.

name: Viser Des
description: When this card is Normal Summoned: Target 1 monster your opponent controls; during your 3rd Standby Phase after activation, destroy that target. While that target is face-up on the field, this card cannot be destroyed by battle.

name: Waboku
description: You take no battle damage this turn. Your monsters cannot be destroyed by battle this turn.

name: Warrior Lady of the Wasteland
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 EARTH Warrior monster with 1500 or less ATK from your Deck, in Attack Position.

name: Wasteland
description: All Dinosaur, Zombie, and Rock monsters on the field gain 200 ATK/DEF.

name: White Dragon Ritual
description: This card is used to Ritual Summon "Paladin of White Dragon". You must also Tribute monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal 4 or more.

name: White Dragon Wyverburster
description: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by banishing 1 DARK monster from your GY. You can only Special Summon "White Dragon Wyverburster" once per turn this way. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can add 1 "Black Dragon Collapserpent" from your Deck to your hand.

name: White-Horned Dragon
description: When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: Target up to 5 Spell Cards in your opponent's Graveyard; banish those targets, and if you do, this card gains 300 ATK for each card banished by this effect.

name: Witch of the Black Forest
description: If this card is sent from the field to the GY: Add 1 monster with 1500 or less DEF from your Deck to your hand, but you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with that name for the rest of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Witch of the Black Forest" once per turn.

name: Wonder Wand
description: Equip only to a Spellcaster monster. It gains 500 ATK. If you control the equipped monster and this card: You can send both to the GY; draw 2 cards.

name: Wroughtweiler
description: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard: Target 1 "Elemental HERO" monster and 1 "Polymerization" in your Graveyard; add those targets to your hand.

name: Yami
description: All Fiend and Spellcaster monsters on the field gain 200 ATK/DEF, also all Fairy monsters on the field lose 200 ATK/DEF.

name: Zoa
description: A monster whose full potential can be achieved when outfitted with "Metalmorph".

name: Zombyra the Dark
description: This card cannot attack your opponent directly. If this card destroys a monster by battle: This card loses 200 ATK.
